ideation: This animation sequence depicts a chef preparing food. The primary action involves stirring a pot, so the right arm will be the main focus. The left arm will hold a recipe or perhaps rest at the side.  The movement should be smooth and deliberate, reflecting the calm focus of a chef at work. Frame 1: The left arm rests at the side, slightly bent. The right arm is positioned as if holding a large spoon or spatula. Frame 2: The right arm begins the stirring motion, moving in a circular arc. Frame 3: The right arm completes half of the circular stirring motion. Frame 4: The right arm completes a full circular stirring motion, returning to its original position. Frame 5: The right arm rests, implying the stirring is complete, and the left arm might lift slightly to check seasoning or adjust the recipe.

frames.beat: chef's arms rest, ready to cook
right arm begins a deep stirring motion
the spoon sweeps across the pot
the stirring motion completes its arc
